article.title: Cursor releases iPhone and iPad app following recent acquisition by SpaceX
article.summary: Earlier this month, SpaceX (which includes xAI) purchased the agentic coding firm Cursor. Today, Cursor has released its first iOS app.
article.title_zh: Cursor在SpaceX收購後推出iPhone和iPad應用程式
article.summary_zh: SpaceX（包含xAI）本月收購代碼編輯工具Cursor後，Cursor現已發布首個iOS應用程式。

article.title: Law proposed to ban AI companies from selling your health data
article.summary: People commonly disclose all kinds of personal data to AI chatbots, including the highly inadvisable practice of asking them for health advice. In addition to the grave medical dangers of obtaining inaccurate advice, users are also running significant privacy risks. Most AI chatbots have terms and conditions that allow any of your conversations with them to be used as training data, and often app terms that allow data to be collated and sold. Democrats now propose to update a privacy law to prevent the sale of health data …
article.title_zh: 擬議法律禁止 AI 公司販售你的健康數據
article.summary_zh: 用戶經常向 AI 聊天機器人洩露個人數據，包括尋求醫療建議，存在隱私風險和醫療安全隱患。

article.title: Florida bans local governments from pursuing net-zero emissions goals
article.summary: A new state law limits Florida communities’ aims to offset greenhouse gas emissions that are warming the global climate and intensifying disasters such as hurricanes. Specifically, HB 1217 prohibits local governments from pursuing net-zero emissions goals. At least 10 cities and counties have implemented such policies, including Fort Lauderdale, Miami, Orlando, and Leon County, where Tallahassee, the state capital, is located. But the new law will not necessarily upend these policies, said Bradley Marshall, senior attorney at Earthjustice, an advocacy group. “It’s certainly meant to scare municipalities and local governments from trying to do things to further net-zero policies,” he said. “Now, its exact impact and what it exactly prohibits is probably up for some debate. Things that are a
article.title_zh: 佛羅里達州禁止地方政府追求淨零排放目標
article.summary_zh: 一項新州法律限制佛羅里達州社區抵消溫室氣體排放的目標，該氣體導致全球氣候變暖並加劇颶風等災害；HB 1217 法案禁止地方政府追求淨零排放目標。

article.title: Open-Source RISC-V Platform Trains Chip Designers From RTL To Silicon (ETH Z., lowRISC, U of Bologna)
article.summary: Researchers from ETH Zurich, lowRISC, and University of Bologna published a technical paper titled “Croc: Training the Next Generation Chip Designers on Domain-Specific End-to-End Open Source Silicon.” This paper describes Croc , an open-source, customizable RISC-V SoC platform and teaching flow that lets students take domain-specific chip-design projects from architecture and RTL through physical design and manufacturable layouts. Find the technical paper here . June 2026. Zelioli, Enrico, Philippe Sauter, Thomas Benz, Hannah Pochert, Luisa Wüthrich, Beat Muheim, Frank K. Gürkaynak, and Luca Benini. “Croc: Training the Next Generation Chip Designers on Domain-Specific End-to-End Open Source Silicon.” arXiv preprint arXiv:2606.25673 (2026). The post Open-Source RISC-V Platform
article.title_zh: 開源 RISC-V 平台從 RTL 到矽的晶片設計師培訓（蘇黎世聯邦理工學院、lowRISC、波隆那大學）
article.summary_zh: 蘇黎世聯邦理工學院、lowRISC 和波隆那大學的研究人員發表了題為「Croc：針對領域特定端到端開源矽的下一代晶片設計師培訓」的技術論文，介紹了可定製的開源 RISC-V SoC 平台和教學流程。

article.title: OpenClaw app for Android puts AI agents in your pocket and… looks like that
article.summary: AI agents are the latest “next big thing” for AI, but OpenClaw has been working at the idea for a while now. Today, OpenClaw is bringing a gateway app to Android (and iOS) to help bring agents on the go. It also looks… like that .
article.title_zh: OpenClaw Android應用程式將AI代理帶入你的口袋
article.summary_zh: OpenClaw一直致力於AI代理技術，現推出Android和iOS的應用程式以方便攜帶使用。

article.title: Google Meet’s Gemini-powered ‘Take notes for me’ comes to Google AI Pro, Ultra
article.summary: Following Workspace availability in 2024 , “Take notes for me” in Google Meet is now available for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers.
article.title_zh: Google Meet 的 Gemini 動力「為我記筆記」功能現已支援 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra
article.summary_zh: 繼 2024 年在 Workspace 上推出後，Google Meet 的「為我記筆記」功能現已提供給 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 訂閱用戶使用。

article.title: Vibe coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
article.summary: Wix-owned vibe coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.
article.title_zh: Vibe coding 平台 Base44 推出自有模型，AI 新創公司尋求差異化
article.summary_zh: Wix 旗下的 vibe coding 平台 Base44 開始推出自有 AI 模型，希望最終能超越前沿模型的性能。

article.title: Amazon’s defense of Vega OS still doesn’t explain why users should be excited, Fire TV or not
article.summary: TL;DR Amazon says Vega OS improves performance and security, but its biggest trade-off is the loss of Android app sideloading. The company argues most users won’t notice the change, though Fire TV enthusiasts lose much of the platform’s flexibility. So far, Vega OS hasn’t delivered noticeably cheaper hardware or compelling new features to justify the switch for consumers. If you’ve ever owned a Fire TV Stick , you’ve likely appreciated the freedom it offers — installing an app that wasn’t in the Amazon app store, setting up a VPN, or even swapping out the default launcher took just a few minutes. That flexibility helped set Fire TV apart from rivals like Roku and Apple TV. This has since become a thing of the past. When Amazon introduced the Fire TV Stick 4K Select last year, it marked the
article.title_zh: Amazon 對 Vega OS 的辯護仍未解釋為什麼用戶應該感到興奮，Fire TV 亦然
article.summary_zh: Amazon 聲稱 Vega OS 改進了性能和安全性，但最大的代價是失去 Android 應用旁加載功能。該公司聲稱大多數用戶不會注意到這一變化，儘管 Fire TV 愛好者失去了該平台的大部分靈活性。

article.title: “The harness is where the hard work is”: Harness bets on agents that enterprises can trust in production
article.summary: The agentic platform Harness launched  Autonomous Worker Agents  on Tuesday, enabling enterprises to replace fixed scripts in their delivery pipelines with AI agents that reason through tasks such as deployment, testing, and security scans, all under the governance and audit controls those companies already use. Harness’ pipelines have long run through a series of deterministic steps, like deploying code to Kubernetes or running a security scan. Now, any of those steps can run as an agent instead, which makes them far more flexible while keeping the same guardrails. The company isn’t new to agents, of course. Harness’ expert agents, generally available since last year, advise developers and help author pipelines from a chat window or an IDE. Autonomous Worker Ag
article.title_zh: 「繁重的工作在治理上」：Harness 推出企業級可信代理
article.summary_zh: Harness 推出 Autonomous Worker Agents，使企業能用可在生產環境中信賴的 AI 代理取代交付管道中的固定腳本。

article.title: Google Cloud to Offer Specialist AI Models for Science Research
article.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google will start offering specialist artificial intelligence models from software company SandboxAQ through its cloud service, expanding enterprise and research access to technology designed to accelerate drug discovery, materials science and semiconductor manufacturing.
article.title_zh: Google Cloud 將為科學研究提供專業 AI 模型
article.summary_zh: 字母公司的 Google 將開始通過其雲服務提供軟體公司 SandboxAQ 的專業人工智慧模型，擴展企業和研究對設計用於加速藥物發現、材料科學和半導體製造技術的訪問。

article.title: OpenAI teases Codex-branded hardware collaboration coming, here’s what to expect
article.summary: OpenAI just teased an upcoming collaborative hardware project that’s set to launch in July. From the looks of it, OpenAI may be teaming up with a popular keyboard maker to release a Codex-branded input device.
article.title_zh: OpenAI暗示Codex品牌硬體協作即將推出
article.summary_zh: OpenAI預告將於7月推出Codex品牌硬體協作專案，可能與知名鍵盤製造商合作推出輸入設備。

article.title: WhatsApp usernames launch ‘later this year’ – here’s how to get yours now
article.summary: WhatsApp has just announced that usernames are officially coming, but you might not be able to get yours just yet.
article.title_zh: WhatsApp 使用者名稱將於「今年稍後推出」—— 以下是如何立即獲取您的使用者名稱
article.summary_zh: WhatsApp 宣布使用者名稱即將正式推出，但您現在可能還無法獲取自己的使用者名稱。

article.title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
article.summary: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.
article.title_zh: 所有人都在用的 AI 排行榜 Arena 現已成為 1 億美元業務
article.summary_zh: 運營熱門免費 AI 排行榜的新創公司去年 9 月剛推出商業服務。
